title: betula davurica var. parvifolia
intro: Betula davurica var. parvifolia, also known as the Korean dwarf birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to East Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Betula davurica var. parvifolia include reducing fever and relieving symptoms of the common cold and flu, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
